description: Classic loafers with a tapering pointed toe from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. A spin off of the classic penny loafers, this low-top pair is a love-forever classic. Wear this leather shoe with natty, structured formal trousers and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine leather upper with stitch detailing Reinforced overlay on the heel for support to the ankle Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Terraced grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
